error_signature: deploy button missing from Publish panel
title: Deploy button missing in Publish panel with multiple languages
symptom: The Deploy button is not visible in the Publish panel, only tab headers are shown. Users cannot trigger deployment due to the missing button.
applies_when: Multiple languages are configured in the app
User is accessing the Publish panel
not_this_if: The button is visible in other panels
root_cause: The absence of the Deploy button in the Publish panel occurs when multiple languages are set up in the app. This seems to be a bug that affects the visibility of the deployment options.
fix_steps: Go to your app or page Language Settings
Check the Publish panel again for the Deploy button
agent_instruction: Re-select the languages in the Language Settings to restore the Deploy button in the Publish panel.
